title: Can you have the crawler follow links?
one_liner: User asks whether the scraper can recursively follow links on parsed pages; it does not, this is a clarifying question to answer and close (research is driven by retriever search results, not link crawling).

title: Connect with Langfuse (single trace per operation)
one_liner: Request to wrap a full research run in a single Langfuse trace instead of many; requires adding tracing/observability context propagation, a design decision for the maintainer.

title: MCP Integration Not Using Structured Content
one_liner: Reports MCP integration ignores structured_content; code in gpt_researcher/mcp/research.py already handles structured_content (preferring it over content), so likely already fixed in a later version, verify against reporter's v3.3.3 then close.

title: GPTR Randomly Fails to Generate a Report
one_liner: Intermittent failure to start research with no reproduction; maintainer already asked for more logs, keep as needs-info or close as stale (no response since Aug 2025).

title: Multi agents still have redundant content across different sections
one_liner: Multi-agent reports still repeat content across chapters (regression of #548); needs prompt/orchestration work in multi_agents to dedupe section content.

title: How/where to set DEEP_RESEARCH_BREADTH so multi-agent uses it
one_liner: User wants to know where to point a custom config.json / set deep research params; answer is via .env or config_file param (a commenter already confirmed .env works), reply and close.

title: Add Multi-Agent Functionality to FastAPI Frontend
one_liner: Request to bring multi-agent workflows (currently only in the Next.js frontend) to the FastAPI/static frontend; large feature requiring maintainer prioritization.

title: Frontend docker image is ARM64, missing AMD64
one_liner: Next.js frontend Docker image is published only for arm64; fix the docker build/publish workflow to do multi-arch (buildx amd64+arm64), possibly removing the primp dep blocker as a collaborator noted.

title: Error converting markdown to pdf (pdf_styles.css not found)
one_liner: PDF export fails with relative path './styles/pdf_styles.css' not found when CWD differs; fix by resolving the CSS path relative to the module/package rather than CWD.

title: MCP server configs not found when agent asks follow-up questions
one_liner: MCP configs work for the initial query but are lost (empty mcp_configs) for agent-generated sub-queries and in deep research mode; fix config/researcher-instance propagation to sub-researchers.

title: No embedding data received
one_liner: User points FAST/SMART/STRATEGIC_LLM at a vLLM gpt-oss endpoint but no EMBEDDING is configured, so embedding calls hit an incompatible endpoint; reply explaining EMBEDDING config requirement and that the chat base_url doesn't serve embeddings.

title: Running research on local documents doesn't work
one_liner: Selecting 'My Documents' with DOC_PATH set produces no output; maintainer committed to testing, needs reproduction of the DOC_PATH/local-docs flow in the FastAPI backend and a fix.

title: GPT-Researcher File Upload Vulnerability Summary
one_liner: Upload endpoint accepts arbitrary file types with no size/type validation; maintainer noted backend is demo-only, but adding type/size validation in handle_file_upload is a cheap hardening win to decide on.

title: Report Generator Hallucinates Sources
one_liner: When context is empty the writer invents fake/homepage URLs; reporter also found writer.py/ReportGenerator don't thread the custom prompt_family and deep-research process_research_results bypasses it, fix prompt_family propagation plus add an empty-context / URL-allowlist guard.

title: Can't output PDF and more
one_liner: PDF button opens a blank page (200 OK) and N8N HTTP requests return temp_id without executing; likely same PDF-export path issue as #1520 plus async task handling, needs more detail/repro.

title: DEEP mode does not stop when retrievers cannot obtain context
one_liner: Deep research loops forever when retrievers return no context (e.g. bad Tavily key / no internet); add an empty-context termination / max-iteration guard in deep_research.

title: Cloudflare MITM included in the self-hosted codebase
one_liner: Static frontend/index.html loads font-awesome and showdown from cdnjs.cloudflare.com CDN (not a MITM, just external CDN deps); vendor these assets locally to remove the external dependency.

title: [Dependency Review] 2025-12-31
one_liner: Automated dependency audit listing pending dependabot PRs, stale deps (langgraph, next, fastapi) and a UV-migration recommendation; maintainer to decide which upgrades/migrations to accept.

title: GPL License Alternative PDF Scraper Implementation
one_liner: Proposes a pdfminer.six (MIT) PDF scraper to avoid PyMuPDF AGPL licensing (re #1571); maintainer to decide whether to swap/offer alternative scraper, code is provided.

title: WebSocket error, fixable with reload
one_liner: Starting a new research raises an unhandled WebSocketDisconnect (1005) in handle_websocket_communication, requiring a page reload; handle the disconnect gracefully instead of logging an error/breaking the loop.

title: Optional CI check for agent behavior?
one_liner: Contributor offering to add an optional snapshot-based agent-behavior eval CI check; maintainer to decide if wanted and which entrypoint to wire it to.

title: why ECR and not Github Container Registry?
one_liner: Asks why Docker images depend on AWS ECR rather than a free registry like GHCR; overlaps with #1605, decide on registry strategy (likely move to GHCR).

title: FireCrawl scraper returns empty content under concurrent requests in deep research
one_liner: FireCrawl scraper hits API rate limits under deep-research concurrency (~71% empty content) with no retry/backoff; add rate-limit handling/retry-with-backoff or concurrency throttling in the firecrawl scraper.

title: Add summarization flag to quick_search: search-grounded quick summaries
one_liner: Feature request for an opt-in aggregated-summary mode on quick_search (single grounded synthesis without full deep_research pipeline); maintainer to decide on API surface.

title: Move Docker image publishing to GHCR only and remove AWS ECR/OIDC dependency
one_liner: ECR push via OIDC assume-role is failing and blocking image builds; consolidate Docker publishing to GHCR (packages: write) and drop the AWS credential/ECR steps from build.yml/deploy.yml.

title: Latest version cannot final export report documents
one_liner: Final export hangs with an error in the embeddings_filter contextual-compression path (embeddings.embed_documents failing); likely an embedding-provider misconfig or langchain_classic compat issue, needs the full traceback/embedding config to pinpoint.
